infoGestionHumana2.title: Outsourcing of Administration and Employee Support
infoGestionHumana2.description: We understand employees' needs, which is why our team provides constant support to our clients.

infoGestionHumana2.title: Special Human Talent Management Processes
infoGestionHumana2.description: We focus our efforts on finding the best talent for companies, conducting selection processes and all the talent management an organization may require.

infoGestionHumana2.title: Occupational Health and Safety Management
infoGestionHumana2.description: We create a strategic model that brings together the best professionals in the sector to plan appropriate actions for workers' health and safety.

infoGestionHumana2.title: Payroll and Contractor Payment Automation Outsourcing
infoGestionHumana2.description: We run all payroll settlement, auditing, and execution processes for employees as required by the companies.

infoGestionHumana2.title: Outsourcing of Incapacities and Economic Recognitions Management
infoGestionHumana2.description: Handling of money transfers, portfolio purchases, disbursements, credit legalization, and generation of documents such as approval letters.

infoGestionHumana2.title: Customer Service and Digital Transformation
infoGestionHumana2.description: Our clients are the source of our transformation. Each challenge proposed is the fuel that drives us to grow and create new strategies.

infoGestionHumana2.title: Attraction, Selection, and Workforce Planning
infoGestionHumana2.description: We focus our efforts on finding the best talent for companies, conducting selection processes and all the talent management organizations may require.

infoGestionHumana2.title: Consulting
infoGestionHumana2.description: We support organizations in initiatives aimed at ensuring "the right people," are "doing the right things," and "achieving the desired results."

infoGestionHumana2.title: Additional Services
infoGestionHumana2.description: Flexibility models, accounting reconciliations, tax advice regarding withholding, and legal guidance concerning contracts, UGPP advising, and audits.

textoGestionHumana.title: Hire custom solutions, fit for your organization
textoGestionHumana.description: Our payroll software is highly customizable, dynamic, and flexible. It is a tool with 100% web technology that offers an easy, fast, and secure payroll process.

textoGestionHumana2.title: Business Process Outsourcing - BPO
textoGestionHumana2.description: Formal operational processes and trained personnel to support your methods for attending to employees, payment calculation, and the reliable delivery of information to third parties.

textoGestionHumana3.title: We are a team
textoGestionHumana3.description: Teamwork is one of our main strategies. We are convinced that collective power is the essential tool to create innovative solutions. As a business group, we join forces with large companies that are today our technological, creative, and financial partners.

textoGestionHumana4.title: We are Management
textoGestionHumana4.description: We believe in technology as a tool for transforming work environments. We generate spaces and opportunities that provide better conditions for employees.
